checklistSentences.en: I will measure the window first.
The wall is concrete.
I need to use wall plugs.

vocabulary.example: I need wall anchors for this concrete wall.
Screw the bracket into the wall first.
The curtain rod is too long for this window.
This blind needs to be cut to size.
The valance covers the top of the curtain rail.
The curtain track needs to be level.
Please check if the bracket is level.
This wall is gyprock, not concrete.
I need a smaller drill bit for this screw.
Let me double check the measurement before drilling.

sentences.en: I will measure the window first.
This wall is concrete, so I need to use anchors.
sentences.zh: 這牆是水泥牆,我需要用膨脹塞。

sentences.en: The bracket needs to be level.
How wide do you want the curtain to be?
I will clean up after the installation.
sentences.zh: 安裝完後我會清理現場。

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: How long will it take to install the blinds?
lines.zhHint: 客戶問安裝要多久

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: It usually takes about one hour per window.
lines.zhHint: 回答大概一個窗戶一小時

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: Can you also check the bracket on the left side? It feels loose.
lines.zhHint: 客戶要求檢查左邊的支架,感覺鬆了

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Sure, I will check it and tighten it if needed.
lines.zhHint: 回答好,會檢查並上緊

quiz.question: "Anchor" in this context means:
The wall is ___, so I need anchors.
翻譯成英文:支架需要是水平的。
quiz.answer: The bracket needs to be level.

checklistSentences.en: I will wrap the furniture first.
We need straps to secure this in the truck.
checklistSentences.zh: 我們需要綁帶把這個固定在車上。

checklistSentences.en: Please label each box.

vocabulary.example: Please label each moving box.
I will wrap the sofa with a furniture pad.
We will use a dolly for the fridge.
This box is fragile, please be careful.
I will wrap the mirror in bubble wrap.
Lift with your legs, not your back.
The staircase is narrow, we need to be careful.
I will park the truck near the entrance.
Let's go through the inventory before we start.
I need to disassemble the bed frame first.

sentences.en: Where do you want this box?
I will wrap the furniture first.
Please be careful, this is fragile.
We need two people to lift this.
sentences.zh: 我們需要兩個人來抬這個。

sentences.en: Is there parking near the entrance?

dialogue.title: Quoting an extra job on the day

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: Can you move this wardrobe without disassembling it?
lines.zhHint: 客戶問可以不拆衣櫃就搬嗎

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Let me check the size first. If it doesn't fit through the door, I will need to disassemble it.
lines.zhHint: 回答先檢查尺寸,如果過不了門就要拆

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: Okay, how much extra will that cost?
lines.zhHint: 客戶問要多收多少錢

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: It will be an extra $30 for disassembly and reassembly.
lines.zhHint: 回答拆裝多收30元

quiz.question: "Fragile" means:
I will ___ the mirror in bubble wrap.
翻譯成英文:我們需要兩個人來抬這個。
quiz.answer: We need two people to lift this.

checklistSentences.en: I will check the issue first.
I need to find the studs before drilling.
checklistSentences.zh: 我需要先找到牆內骨架再鑽孔。

checklistSentences.en: This will take about an hour.

vocabulary.example: I need to tighten this screw.
There is a leak under the sink.
The door hinge is loose.
I will apply caulking around the bathtub.
I can patch this hole in the wall.

vocabulary.zh: 固定裝置（燈具/水龍頭等）
vocabulary.example: This light fixture needs to be replaced.
Use silicone to seal the gap.
I need to find the studs before drilling.
Apply sealant around the window frame.
This repair comes with a 30-day warranty.

sentences.en: I will fix the leak under the sink.
sentences.zh: 我會修好水槽下面的漏水。

sentences.en: The door hinge needs replacing.
I can patch this hole today.
sentences.zh: 我今天可以補好這個洞。

sentences.en: Let me find the studs first.
sentences.zh: 我先找一下牆內的骨架。

sentences.en: This job comes with a 30-day warranty.

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: There's a leak under my kitchen sink. Can you fix it today?
lines.zhHint: 客戶說廚房水槽下面漏水,問今天能不能修

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Yes, I can come this afternoon. Can you send me a photo first?
lines.zhHint: 回答可以今天下午到,先請對方傳照片

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: Sure, I'll send it now. How much will it cost?
lines.zhHint: 客戶說馬上傳照片,並問費用

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: It depends on the cause, but it's usually around $120 to $180.
lines.zhHint: 回答視原因而定,通常120到180元

quiz.question: "Leak" means:
The door ___ is loose.
翻譯成英文:我今天可以補好這個洞。
quiz.answer: I can patch this hole today.

checklistSentences.en: Let me take a quick measurement before I quote.
checklistSentences.zh: 報價前我先簡單量一下尺寸。

checklistSentences.en: I will send you the quote by text.
checklistSentences.zh: 我會用短訊把報價發給你。

checklistSentences.en: This price is just an estimate.

vocabulary.example: I will send you a quote tomorrow.
I need a 20% deposit to book the job.
I will email you the invoice after the job.
This is just an estimate, the final price may vary.
The labour cost is $80 per hour.
Material is not included in this quote.
There is a $50 callout fee.
What is your availability this week?
Can you confirm the appointment time?
Please pay the balance after the job is done.

sentences.en: It will be around $250.
Material is not included.
I can come after 2 pm.
I need a 20% deposit to confirm the booking.
sentences.zh: 我需要20%訂金才能確認預約。

sentences.en: I will send you the invoice by email.

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: How much will it cost to assemble this wardrobe?
lines.zhHint: 客戶問組裝衣櫃要多少錢

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: It will be around $150, including labour. Material is not included.
lines.zhHint: 回答大概150元,含工資,不含材料

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: Can you come tomorrow morning?
lines.zhHint: 客戶問明天早上可以來嗎

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Yes, I am available tomorrow morning. I will confirm the exact time tonight.
lines.zhHint: 回答明天早上可以,今晚會確認確切時間

quiz.question: "Deposit" means:
___ is not included in this quote.
翻譯成英文:我兩點後可以過去。

checklistSentences.en: I always warm up before lifting.
checklistSentences.zh: 我每次練重量前都會先熱身。

checklistSentences.en: Today is leg day.
I will track my reps and sets.
checklistSentences.zh: 我會記錄我的次數和組數。

vocabulary.example: I did three sets of squats.
Try to do 12 reps per set.
I always warm up before lifting.
Can you be my spotter for this set?
My deadlift max is 140kg.
I do cardio twice a week.
Today is my rest day.
I need more protein in my diet.
I hit a new PR on bench press today.
Focus on your form, not the weight.

sentences.en: I usually train four times a week.
Can you spot me for this set?
sentences.zh: 你可以幫我保護這一組嗎?

sentences.en: I need to work on my form.
sentences.zh: 我需要改善我的動作姿勢。

sentences.en: Today I hit a new personal record.
Let's warm up first before the heavy sets.
sentences.zh: 我們先熱身再做重的那組。

dialogue.title: Talking deadlifts with a gym friend

lines.speaker: friend
lines.en: How much can you deadlift now?
lines.zhHint: 朋友問你現在硬舉能舉多重

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: My current max is 140kg. I'm trying to hit 150kg by next month.
lines.zhHint: 回答目前最重140公斤,目標下個月150公斤

lines.speaker: friend
lines.en: That's impressive. Do you train every day?
lines.zhHint: 朋友稱讚並問是不是每天練

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: No, I train four days a week and rest on the other days.
lines.zhHint: 回答不是,一週練四天,其他天休息

quiz.question: "Rep" means:
Today is my ___ day.
翻譯成英文:你可以幫我保護這一組嗎?
quiz.answer: Can you spot me for this set?

checklistSentences.en: I will test this feature before deploying.
checklistSentences.zh: 我部署前會先測試這個功能。

checklistSentences.en: Let me check the logs for errors.
checklistSentences.zh: 我來檢查一下記錄裡有沒有錯誤。

checklistSentences.en: This workflow saves me a lot of time.
checklistSentences.zh: 這個工作流程幫我省了很多時間。

vocabulary.example: I need to improve my prompt for better results.
This workflow automation saves me two hours a day.
I built a workflow to handle customer quotes automatically.
I connected my app to the OpenAI API.
I will deploy this app to a live server.
The customer data is stored in a database.
I am working on the integration between two apps.
I found a bug in the booking form.
This new feature lets users upload photos.
This is the third iteration of the design.

sentences.en: I am building an automation for customer quotes.
sentences.zh: 我正在建立一個客戶報價的自動化系統。

sentences.en: This bug is affecting the booking form.
sentences.zh: 這個程式錯誤影響到了預約表單。

sentences.en: I need to deploy this update today.
sentences.zh: 我今天需要部署這次更新。

sentences.en: Can you explain how this workflow works?
sentences.zh: 你可以解釋一下這個工作流程怎麼運作嗎?

sentences.en: I am testing a new feature this week.
sentences.zh: 我這週在測試一個新功能。

dialogue.title: Updating a colleague on the project

lines.speaker: colleague
lines.en: How is your AI automation project going?
lines.zhHint: 同事問AI自動化專案進度如何

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: It's going well. I just finished the integration with the booking system.
lines.zhHint: 回答進展順利,剛完成跟預約系統的整合

lines.speaker: colleague
lines.en: Did you run into any issues?
lines.zhHint: 同事問有沒有遇到問題

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Yes, there was a bug in the API connection, but I fixed it yesterday.
lines.zhHint: 回答有,API連接有個錯誤,但昨天已修好

quiz.question: "Automation" means:
I found a ___ in the booking form.
翻譯成英文:我今天需要部署這次更新。
quiz.answer: I need to deploy this update today.

checklistSentences.en: I need to check the address first.
I will bring my wallet and keys.
Please send me the appointment time.

vocabulary.example: I have an appointment at 3 pm.
Can you send me the address?
Can I get a receipt, please?
Can I get a refund?
Can I exchange this item?
Can you give me directions?
Where is the entrance?
Is there parking nearby?
Are you available tomorrow?
Please confirm the time.
Can you text me the details?
Is there a supermarket nearby?
This is urgent.

vocabulary.zh: 可用時間 / 有空時間
vocabulary.example: What is your available time?
Please bring your ID.

sentences.en: I have an appointment at 3 pm.
Can you send me the address?
sentences.zh: 你可以把地址傳給我嗎？

sentences.en: Is there parking nearby?
Can I get a receipt, please?
I need to reschedule my appointment.
Please text me the details.
I am not available this afternoon.
I will confirm it later today.

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment.
lines.zhHint: 你說需要改預約時間

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: No problem. What time works for you?
lines.zhHint: 對方問你什麼時間方便

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Tomorrow morning works better for me.
lines.zhHint: 你回答明天早上比較方便

lines.speaker: customer
lines.en: Okay, I will confirm the new time by text.
lines.zhHint: 對方說會用簡訊確認新時間

quiz.question: "Appointment" means:
Can you send me the ___?
翻譯成英文：我需要改預約時間。
quiz.answer: I need to reschedule my appointment.
